## What and why

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] Added or updated a test for the changed behavior
- [ ] Docs updated if needed (README / docs)
- [ ] If a defense layer changed, noted the OWASP LLM item it affects (see docs/STANDARDS.md)
- [ ] No operational harm instructions added; attack code stays defensive
